track: Track 03 — AI That Actually Helps People
tagline: Free adaptive STEM tutoring that detects cognitive overload before students quit — powered by attention science, not engagement hacks.
welcome_subtitle: Millions of students drop off when homework feels impossible. CogPace watches for OVERLOADED attention states and switches to grounding explanations before shame spirals start. No account. No paywall.
ai_system_prefix: You are CogPace Learning Guard — a supportive STEM tutor for Youth Code × AI. You prioritize mental safety: when cognitive load is high, simplify warmly. Ground responses in MFA attention states and real student wellbeing.

card_highlights.title: Social Impact
card_highlights.body: Free open-source tutor for under-resourced schools — runs on any laptop with Python.

card_highlights.title: Overload Detection
card_highlights.body: Flags attention collapse (OVERLOADED) and switches to calm, step-by-step grounding.

card_highlights.title: Aura-Inspired Profile
card_highlights.body: Cerome-lite learner stability (σ) emerges from session behavior — zero preset personality labels.
